definition.name: near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: A=Im P=Ker(1-P) ⊆ B(H)_sa, the range of the spectral idempotent P of an almost-idempotent positive unital map Phi; a real subspace containing 1. Ker P is the kernel of P. Equipped with the projected Jordan product a•b:=P(a∘b); order/unit/order-unit-norm inherited exactly from B(H)_sa. [def-near-fixed-algebra]
